description: This Java class defines the ReviewEvent entity for logging audit events related to business loan operations, mapped to the 'audit_event' table in the database.

classes.name: AuditEvent
classes.description: Entity class representing an audit log event for tracking business loan-related activities, stored in the 'audit_event' table.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the audit event.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the audit event.

methods.name: getEventType
methods.description: Returns the type of the event.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the user associated with the event.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the user associated with the event.

methods.name: getCorrelationId
methods.description: Returns the correlation ID for linking related events.

methods.name: getIpAddress
methods.description: Returns the IP address from which the event was generated.

methods.name: getOutcome
methods.description: Returns the outcome of the event, e.g., SUCCESS or FAILURE.

methods.name: setOutcome
methods.description: Sets the outcome of the event.

methods.name: getDetails
methods.description: Returns the JSON payload as a string.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the event was created.
